items.summary: Build an Interviews page: display a list/calendar toggle of scheduled interviews showing candidate name, job, interview type, date/time, interviewer, and status; provide a form to schedule a new interview or edit existing ones; allow marking interviews as completed or cancelled.

Build an Offers page: list all generated offer letters with candidate name, job, salary, start date, and status badge; provide a form to generate a new offer letter with custom clauses; display a formatted offer letter preview; allow updating offer status to accepted or declined.

Build an Analytics page with visual charts: line chart for applications over time (last 30 days), donut chart for pipeline stage distribution, bar chart for top jobs by application volume, and a table of average time-to-hire per job. Use React Query to fetch data from backend analytics endpoints.

Enhance the Dashboard page to display live recruiter analytics summary cards for: total open jobs, total active candidates, total interviews this week, and average time-to-hire; a bar chart of candidates per pipeline stage; and a ranked list of top 5 AI-matched candidates across all open jobs.
